title: Casual Trading
description: You are a person with a dream of a luxurious life, but this game you have to start from the position of a car mechanic, who just downloaded the trading app and has no idea what lies ahead of him Its a Success Simulator game. Trade and get rich! Trade like a real trader and buy the best cars, upgrade your living space and if youre ready for a real luxury - boats, yachts, planes and helicopters will be waiting for you.
